Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: theaters by function [300007132], theaters (buildings) [300007117], performing arts buildings [300132484], performing arts structures [300121919], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Theaters designed and equipped for the presentation of motion pictures to the public, or any buildings in which films are shown.
Teatro diseñado y equipado para la presentación al público de películas de cine.
Theaters die zijn ontworpen en toegerust voor het vertonen van speelfilms aan een publiek.
為了放映電影給大眾觀賞而加以設計裝潢的劇院。
Teatros concebidos e equipados para a apresentação de filmes ao público, ou quaisquer edifícios onde sejam exibidos filmes.

Source.Source_ID: 2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)
